# Pull Request

## What & why
<!-- What does this change and why? Link related issues (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor / chore / test

## Checklist
- [ ] `make build` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make up && make smoke` passes (end-to-end)
- [ ] Regenerated code if needed (`make proto` / `make sqlc`)
- [ ] Updated docs in **both** `docs/en` and `docs/id` when behavior/APIs changed
- [ ] Follows Conventional Commits

## Notes for reviewers
<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on. -->
